component.name: Veriscode
component.summary: A VS Code-based SystemVerilog learning IDE with an interactive simulator

description.p: Veriscode is a customized build of VS Code with Verible linting and an interactive SystemVerilog simulator built in. Create a project, write a module, click Simulate, and drive an interactive, cycle-by-cycle timing diagram - Icarus Verilog runs invisibly underneath.
